title: Board Mission Statement Page

fields.label: Kicker
fields.name: inner_banner_kicker
fields.instructions: Small line above the page title.
fields.default_value: Welcome to Port St Mary Commissioners Board

fields.label: Ribbon
fields.name: inner_banner_ribbon
fields.instructions: Red ribbon label below the heading.

fields.label: Intro
fields.name: inner_banner_intro
fields.default_value: Working together to support our local community and ensure Port St Mary remains a vibrant, welcoming and safe place for all.

fields.label: Image
fields.name: mission_statement_image
fields.instructions: Single image for the left column.

fields.label: Body Text
fields.name: mission_statement_body
fields.instructions: One paragraph per line. The first line displays with the red accent.
fields.default_value:
The Port St Mary Commissioners are committed to serving our community with transparency, integrity and care. Our mission is to support local needs, maintain essential services and help Port St Mary thrive as a vibrant seaside village.
We work collaboratively with residents, local organisations and stakeholders to deliver services that reflect the values and priorities of our community. Through open communication and responsible stewardship, we aim to build trust and strengthen community engagement.
Our focus is on maintaining public spaces, supporting local initiatives and ensuring that decisions are made in the best interests of those who live, work and visit Port St Mary. We are dedicated to listening, responding and acting with accountability at all times.

fields.label: Document Label
fields.name: mission_statement_document_label
fields.instructions: Link text for the mission statement PDF.

fields.label: Document PDF
fields.name: mission_statement_document_file
fields.instructions: PDF download for the document link.

description: Inner banner and commitment section for the Board Mission Statement page.
